steps.title: Identify the singular possessive requirement
steps.content: The passage refers to the Moon (singular), and the blank requires a possessive form to show that the gravitational pull belongs to the Moon.

steps.title: Apply the singular possessive rule
steps.content: Moon's correctly forms the singular possessive to express ownership of the gravitational pull. Choices B and D lack the possessive marker, while C applies the plural possessive form, which is incorrect for a singular noun. That matches choice A — A is correct.
